# Zero-dep allowlist (roadmap item 31 — per-crate extension of items 1+13).
# INVARIANT: this file may only SHRINK. CI (scripts/zero-dep-gate.sh <crate>) compares HEAD
# against origin/main and fails if any name here is absent there (= growth). The ONLY
# sanctioned growth path is editing the `zero-dep-gate` job in .github/workflows/ci.yml in
# the same reviewed diff. Names-only + full transitive closure of the DEFAULT no-dev build
# (version bumps do not churn this file; a NEW transitive crate via `cargo update` goes RED).
# Generated by: cargo tree -e no-dev --locked --offline --prefix none | grep -v " (/" | awk "{print \$1}" | sort -u
# Ruling records use the slot_arena.rs comment format (item-25 step 9).
#
# RULING: serde carrier — serde+serde_json parse full JSON-RPC 2.0 / MCP protocol frames (foreign
#   peers, ARBITRARY nesting). item-31 Phase-B DEFERRED: real tree-win but the largest, most adversarial
#   parse surface. Reopen only after kernel::json has carried real differential-fuzz load green
#   (master_seed never-silently-replace discipline). wasmtime is optional/off-default (not here).
itoa
memchr
proc-macro2
quote
serde
serde_core
serde_derive
serde_json
syn
unicode-ident
zmij
